programme.desc: Dave awards women with great 'NY boobs' and predicts the chaos by reparations for slavery; musical guest Busta Rhymes.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Mad Real World and Ask a Gay Dude
programme.desc: Dave imagines the TV show The Real World with an all black cast and only one white guy.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: The Lost Episodes
programme.desc: After getting a big new contract, Dave Chappelle sets out to get revenge on all those who have wronged him. Meanwhile, everyone seems to be trying to charge Dave more money for everything now that he is rich.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Zapped and It's a Wonderful Chest

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Black Howard Dean and Stereotype Pixies

programme.desc: Dave finally gets his chance to meet the great and powerful Show Business. Later, Dave introduces a group of monsters victimized by discrimination.

programme.desc: Young father shot in the back in Dallas, but no one wants to talk; later in Cleveland, brazen corner store stickup leaves innocent clerk dead.

programme.title: The First 48: Nightmare in Greedy Grove/ Good Man Down
programme.desc: A drive-by shooting among teenage boys leaves an innocent bystander dead.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Death, Lies and Videotape
programme.desc: The execution-style killings of a Florida nightclub owner and two aspiring models are caught on camera.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: The Wrong Gun

programme.title: The Killer Truth: Classified Ad For Crime
programme.desc: Two murders across the country send police into a multi-state manhunt, searching for one killer couple.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Portrait of a Serial Killer

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gold Rush

programme.title: Forensic Files: Four on the Floor

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million

programme.desc: Investigators get involved after a serial arsonist begins starting blazes all over Washington DC.

programme.desc: An employee of a dry-cleaner was raped and murdered in the store with two eyewitnesses.

programme.desc: Two sets of adventurists separately endure the jungles of Panama for ten days. A survivalist makes sandals out of vines to protect her and her partners' feet from the searing heat. Another survivalist uses a bug net for clothing.

programme.title: Naked And Afraid: Feral Fashion: Fur the Win

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Uncensored: Don't Cave In
programme.desc: With extra footage and bonus scenes: A mom and National Guard vet teams up with a firefighter in the relentless Colombian jungle. Forced to huddle in bat-infested caves as violent storms sweep through, they struggle to survive.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Snow Daze
programme.desc: In the frozen American Rockies, snow storms and freezing temperatures force the survivalists to make risky choices with their fire and food sources. An out of control blaze and toxic mushrooms put their challenge and safety at risk.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: No Free Rides
programme.desc: Twelve survivalists take on a 40-day XL challenge in the ferocious, heat-stricken, deadly South African bush, a location so challenging ancient tribes would banish the weak. Now, these survivalists will do the same if someone isn't pulling their weight.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Man vs. Amazon
programme.desc: Two survivalists journey to the most hostile environment on the planet to take on the Amazon without modern conveniences or clothing. They attempt to survive while battling piranhas, jaguars, and mosquitoes.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Bring the Boys Back Home
programme.desc: Ready for another season of list racing, the 405 is hoping to put the past behind them, come together and make street racing fun again. But on race night, the same old games threaten to break them apart before they start.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Run Like Hell
programme.desc: Farmtruck and AZN head to Kansas to fish with the new and improved Gonorail. Back in Oklahoma, Ryan and Dominator repair broken cars in preparation for list racing, but when a driver gets out of control, the evening is brought to an abrupt end.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Time
programme.desc: Monza gets a chance to come for the list after his wreck, Shawn makes plans to get back into the top five, Farmtruck and AZN find a fun use for discarded airbags. Later, drivers make up for the lack of racing the previous week.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Shine On You Crazy Diamond
programme.desc: Ryan Martin looks over his car while Chief and Dave push each other in a competitive testing session, as they all get ready for another chance at number one. At race time, the racers fight to move up the list until broken cars slow everyone down.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Eyes on the Prize (Bristol 2019) Part 1
programme.desc: The racers will give it their all to win the $200 000 at the Bristol No Prep race.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Don't Rain on My Parade (Bristol 2019) Part 2
programme.desc: Sixteen racer move in round two of the Bristol No Prep, but the racers must adjust their tunes for a trickier track after a rainfall.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: The Hard Way
programme.desc: Nearing the end of the list racing season, the racers make big decisions in a last ditch effort to movie up the list. On race night, untested cars mean big problems.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Dark Side of the Moon
programme.desc: With the last list race of the season, the racers get their cars ready while Farmtruck and AZN fish out some fancy cars at cruise night. On race night, a costly mistake threatens to derail Chief.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Cash Days: Another Brick in the Wall
programme.desc: OKC and Texas compete in an old school Cash Days race. Eight drivers from each state race for over $30,000 and the chance to prove that their state has the fastest racers in the country, but a sketchy road throws a wrench into the works for both sides.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Cash Days: Comfortably Numb
programme.desc: On the second night of Cash Days, 405 racers must match up and race, while still fighting to knock out the only remaining Texas driver. The sketchy road is still in play, and it becomes a tuner's game to see who can get down the street in one piece.

programme.desc: Nicole wants her dad to move in with her while he's recovering from cancer treatments, but a flood has recently destroyed her kitchen and until it's fixed, he's on his own across town. The pressure is on for Nate and Jeremiah to get him home ASAP.

programme.title: Nate & Jeremiah by Design: Well-Traveled
programme.desc: The Barnes family is in trouble! Their renovation has gotten away from them and Haley's medical issues have complicated the process. They are desperate for Nate and Jeremiah to help them.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Gone with the Windmill
programme.desc: Matt and Jeremy take on one of their toughest construction projects yet: a windmill cocktail bar for Zach and Tori's wedding. Later, Amy and Matt take their salsa business to the next level by pitching their goods to a local grocery store.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: Birds and Bees Make Babies
programme.desc: Trent and Amber Johnston are in the middle of renovating their dream home from top to bottom while raising five children. As the family prepares for Anna and Elizabeth's first formal dance, they receive a shocking call from school.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: The Chicken Race
programme.desc: The Johnston family is expanding. After having two biological children and adopting three children, it's now time to add a bunch of chickens. While Trent builds a chicken coop, Amber takes Alex and Emma to their first karate class.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: What Big Daddy Wants
programme.desc: There is a dilemma whether to purchase living room furniture or a brand new TV in the midst of renovation. Meanwhile, Jonah tries out for the high school soccer team.

programme.title: Dragnificent!: Pretty in Pink
programme.desc: Laura, a college professor, is struggling to connect with her son, who wants to be a drag queen. Desperate to understand why anyone would want to become a drag queen, Laura calls the Queens for help. They soon realize Laura needs a lot of help of her own.

programme.title: Dragnificent!: Fly Butterfly, Fly
programme.desc: Amy is throwing herself a butterfly party to celebrate losing 130 pounds. Despite shedding the weight, she doesn't feel beautiful. Amy needs the Queens to help her with a new attitude, wardrobe and glam to fulfill her butterfly fantasy.

programme.title: Dragnificent!: You Have the Right to Remain Sassy
programme.desc: Kari, a quirky bride from Ohio, is on the verge of throwing in the towel with her wedding after losing the ceremony space at the 11th hour. The Queens swoop in to save the day but quickly learn there is more at play than a cancelled venue space.

programme.title: Dragnificent!: One Tough Bride
programme.desc: Corrine is a tough wrestler who hides her insecurities behind her wrestling persona. The queens give her an incredible bridal transformation with the confidence to be her true self on her wedding day.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: What Now?: New Beginnings
programme.desc: Jesse is back in the States and open to finding love again. Avery prepares to visit Omar after eight months apart. Loren and Alexei have a life-changing surprise. Steven can't wait to welcome Olga and Alex to the United States.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: What Now?: Reunions and Revelations

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: What Now?: Relationship Roadblocks

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Tirdy Works: The Ultimatum
programme.desc: After her moose video goes viral, Mary focuses full time on making Tirdy Works a viable business. Her partner Deb gives her an ultimatum: make the business profitable by the end of winter or quit.

programme.title: Tirdy Works: The Big Craft Show
programme.desc: Mary, Deb, Tammi, Dale and the rest of the Tirdy Works team heads to a craft show in New Hampshire in search of a market hungry for her art.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Justice

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Wild West
programme.desc: Adam illustrates how, despite its macho man reputation, prostitutes actually helped settle the West. He then goes on to explain why the 'All-American Cowboy' is a myth, and that the real hero of the west wasn't a person at all - it was air conditioning.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Prison
programme.desc: Adam and Eve shed light on jail rehabilitation, solitary confinement and the fact that corporations make money off of prison inmates.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Immigration
programme.desc: Adam illustrates the big problem a border wall wouldn't address, explores the history of racist deportations, and explains how immigration courts are a huge mess.

programme.title: The Last Dance

programme.title: The Last Dance
programme.desc: As Michael Jordan pushes his teammates hard for a sixth NBA title, his intensity and hunger for basketball dominance is in stark contrast to his mindset in October 1993, when he stunned the world by walking away from the game.

programme.title: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Michael Jordan would famously use even the smallest slight imaginable to motivate himself against an opponent. And when his NBA comeback in 1995 fell short in the playoffs, he worked harder than ever to return to form.

programme.title: The Last Dance
programme.desc: In May of 1998, nearly a year after Michael Jordan and the Chicago Bulls fought past Utah in the NBA Finals, their path to a 6th title only gets more challenging, as a brutal 7-game series against the Indiana Pacers decides the Eastern Conference.

programme.title: The Last Dance
programme.desc: In June of 1998, Michael Jordan and the Chicago Bulls take on the Utah Jazz in a finals rematch, looking for a sixth championship.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Good News, Bad News
programme.desc: Officers St. Pierre, Benvenuti and K9 Cora investigate a couple accused of road hunting. An actress tries to perform her way out of a ticket with Officer Hannett. Officer Holmes gets an injured goose call and Officer Frye handles a neighbor dispute.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Wild Winter
programme.desc: Officer Bronson questions a hunter who shot a deer without the proper permit, while Officer Demler runs radar on a popular snowmobile trail. Sgt. Lucas investigates a suspicious deer kill site. And Officer Cyrs responds to a snowmobile accident.

programme.title: North Woods Law: In the Thick of It
programme.desc: At the state's largest ice fishing derby, Officer Canfield looks for the owner of a frozen fishing line while Major Juneau takes command of a mountain rescue. Officer McKee runs radar for snowmobiles. And Officer Cyrs checks on a moose in a bog.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: Conservation Officers statewide join forces with volunteers and the National Guard to launch an intensive search for a missing hiker. In Littleton, Officer McKee gets news of a bear who has infiltrated a home in search of food.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Bump in the Road
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett have an unusually busy day on ATV patrol. Officer McDermott investigates a man who illegally shot a rabbit in a residential area. Officers Holmes and Cyrs use ATVs to rescue an injured hiker on Mount Carter.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Texas Best: Wild Justice
programme.desc: It's snapper season on the Gulf, and as fishermen catch fish, game wardens catch fishermen breaking the law. Two men are investigated for cruelty to a wild pig, a family fishing get educated, and an exotic tortoise finds a new home.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Texas Best: High Desert Drama
programme.desc: The Game Wardens are busy on land and water. In Hunt County, residents are concerned about alleged wolves being kept as pets. Rehabilitated turtles are released on the high seas. In West Texas, wild donkeys are under threat.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Trashed
programme.desc: Across Texas, game wardens work day and night to enforce the law. In East Texas, a young woman is served an arrest warrant. A fisherman has no fishing license but plenty of outstanding warrants. Outside Austin, someone illegally dumps a pile of trash.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Bump in the Road
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett have an unusually busy day on ATV patrol. Officer McDermott investigates a man who illegally shot a rabbit in a residential area. Officers Holmes and Cyrs use ATVs to rescue an injured hiker on Mount Carter.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: Conservation Officers statewide join forces with volunteers and the National Guard to launch an intensive search for a missing hiker. In Littleton, Officer McKee gets news of a bear who has infiltrated a home in search of food.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Texas Best: When Deer Attack
programme.desc: Game Wardens patrol the Rio Grande in search of an unidentified body. Warden Powell investigates an unusual deer case. Wardens Boone and Ataya respond to a call about mountain lions being shot in a woman's backyard.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Texas Best: Poachers and Liars
programme.desc: Game warden Johnson joins his local police department on a search warrant at the home of a well-known poacher. Warden Boone relocates an alligator snapping turtle. Wardens Benoit and Satchfield pull over a crabber and find marijuana in his car.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Roadside Sting
programme.desc: It's opening weekend of deer season and the wardens head out around the state to ensure everyone plays by the rules. In East Texas, an injured owl is rushed to the vet. On the Gulf, Game Wardens get tough when an oysterman's catch doesn't add up.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: Conservation Officers statewide join forces with volunteers and the National Guard to launch an intensive search for a missing hiker. In Littleton, Officer McKee gets news of a bear who has infiltrated a home in search of food.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Bump in the Road
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett have an unusually busy day on ATV patrol. Officer McDermott investigates a man who illegally shot a rabbit in a residential area. Officers Holmes and Cyrs use ATVs to rescue an injured hiker on Mount Carter.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Crocodiles of the Revolution
programme.desc: In East Timor, the Australian Army discovered two crocodiles living in appalling conditions. Steve and his team from Australia Zoo are called to undertake a death-defying crocodile rescue.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Mighty Mountain Puppies
programme.desc: Two Bernese mountain dog pups bond with their barnyard neighbours; a trio of Shiba Inu girls challenge their spick-and-span mom with their messy ways; in a litter of mixed breed Chatham Hill retrievers, a pup takes after his boisterous dad.

programme.title: Dogs 101: All the Presidents' Pets
programme.desc: Meet Bo, President Obama's puppy and What led President Obama to choose a Portuguese water dog. Also meet a menagerie of 'First Dogs' who all share a special connection with the Presidents themselves, having lived side by side with the First Family.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: International: Scandinavia
programme.desc: Join Pete on a treehouse vacation to the pine-forested splendor of Scandinavia. First stop: the magical TreeTop Hotel in Norway. Pete then heads to the Swedish treetops and takes a swim in a frozen lake before checking in at the renowned Treehotel.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Alaskan Mountain Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete travels to Alaska to build a mountaineering lodge in the shadow of North America's highest peak, constructing an A-Framed masterpiece for the Mt. McKinley Princess Wilderness Lodge with breathtaking views of Denali.

programme.title: Tanked!: Where the Wild Things Are
programme.desc: Brett and Wayde get creative with a rockin' tank for a Kiss-themed mini-golf course.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Never Too Late for Love
programme.desc: Elderly chameleon, Mr. Parsons, has a romantic date with young Daphne from France. It's his last chance to father a child. They first met last year but their rendezvous didn't go well so keepers are hoping for better luck second time around.

programme.title: The Zoo: Kangaroo Dave
programme.desc: Dave, a kangaroo suffering from chronic arthritis, tries cryotherapy. A large group of rambunctious gharials are trained to patiently wait for their food. And, a tiny pygmy marmoset gives birth to an even tinier baby.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Scarred
programme.desc: Sui, ready for more responsibility, tests herself by taking the lead in a rescue. An adopter looks for a dog that will feel at home around her many chickens and Tia rescues a pit bull with scars that reveal a painful past.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Jail Break
programme.desc: A challenge comes in the form of a stray dog stuck in the swamp, Tia takes in two sickly puppies from an overwhelmed owner, and one of Villalobos favourite residents finally finds a chance at a forever home.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: A Hunt Above the Clouds
programme.desc: Changing weather forces the Kilchers to venture miles from home in search of food for winter. Eivin and Eve stalk big game above the clouds. Atz Sr. and Bonnie battle the open sea. Otto, Charlotte and August faceoff for food with massive brown bears.

programme.title: Movie: Lottery Ticket
programme.desc: A young man must survive a long weekend after his neighbours in the projects learn that he has a winning lottery ticket.

programme.title: Movie: Edge of Tomorrow
programme.desc: A military officer in a war against an alien race becomes caught in a time loop after he is killed in combat. Forced to experience the same battle over and over, he becomes more proficient with each return, and comes closer to defeating the enemy.

programme.desc: Tensions with Nikita force Jamie to reach out to Joey Gibbons for a resolution. Overworked Louise loses her cool when the staff has to host two separate groups of guests. Everyone scrambles to keep outrageous rockers isolated from a family.

programme.title: Timber Creek Lodge: Not My First Hall Pass
programme.desc: Mark reveals incidents from his past that shock homesick Jenna. Wealthy Texans want a 'Lone Star' experience at Timber Creek Lodge and insert themselves into the staff’s personal lives, pushing Mark to his limit to cross professional lines.

programme.title: Timber Creek Lodge: A Hard 7 at Best

programme.desc: The Pawn Stars snap to attention as they check out a photo album signed by one of history's greatest military leaders: General George S. Patton.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Legends of Rock

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Gilded Pawn Age

programme.desc: There's an air of betrayal at the Gold and Silver Pawn Shop when an super rare ancient Roman "Ides of March" coin comes into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: United States of Pawn

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawnanza

programme.title: American Pickers: The Joy of Sax

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: New World Secrets
programme.desc: Rob investigates a cluster of ancient ruins in New England that suggest Europeans arrived in the Americas almost 1,000 years before Columbus. Then, he heads to California where a dormant super volcano may be showing new signs of life.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Serpent Mound
programme.desc: Rob explores mysterious tunnels beneath Denver's airport, the capitol building, and downtown to investigate rumors of a secret organization that operates below. In Ohio, he tries to uncover the ancient secrets of a giant mound shaped like a serpent.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Texan Mass Extinction
programme.desc: Rob Nelson descends into a cave 30 feet beneath Texas in search of evidence of a mass extinction event. Then, he heads to Lake Michigan to investigate an unexplained, Bermuda Triangle-like phenomenon that has caused ships to disappear for centuries.

programme.title: Killer Hornets From Hell
programme.desc: Follow a group of hunters on a seemingly impossible mission to fight off a swarm of giant hornets quickly migrating around the world. With flesh-eating venom and a piercing stinger, just one of these death machines can kill a full-grown man.

programme.title: How the Earth Works: Ice Age or Hell Fire?
programme.desc: Geologist, Martin Pepper, and biologist, Liz Bonnin, explore North America to find evidence of the most powerful geological events the Earth has ever seen Ice Ages. Finding out how they have both carved the land but also moulded the life that lives on it.

programme.title: How the Earth Works: Japanese Death Match
programme.desc: Liz and Martin visit Japan, to witness the battle that rages between the people and the land they live on. But how much of a threat do Japan's volcanoes, earthquakes and tsunamis pose?

programme.title: How the Earth Works: Will Iceland Poison the Skies?
programme.desc: Martin and Liz explore Iceland to see if its volcanoes could spread global chaos in the future. Martin samples an insane motorsport on ashy slopes, and Liz has the dive of a lifetime between the continental plates of North America and Europe.

programme.title: How the Earth Works: Can Krakatoa Stop Time?
programme.desc: An active volcano with the power to plunge the whole world into a brutal dark age is rising from the sea in the heart of the Asia. It's done it before, and it will erupt again.

programme.title: How the Earth Works: The Rockies Built the Atom Bomb
programme.desc: Geologist, Martin Pepper, and biologist, Liz Bonnin, travel to the iconic Rocky Mountains, to reveal the extraordinary link between the Rockies' soaring peaks and the uranium that ended up in 'Little Boy', the atomic bomb detonated over the Japanese city.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: Tom and Jill Estes' bodies are found behind a dumpster in Festus, Missouri. Police are baffled, until a receipt leads to CCTV of a blood-stained suspect. A trail of bodies reveals a killer who must be stopped - before he strikes again.

programme.title: See No Evil: Gentle Giant
programme.desc: On August 25, 2015, 51-year-old care worker Torrance Cheeves is found stabbed to death in his San Antonio, Texas home. With no suspects and a trail of puzzling evidence, investigators turn to surveillance cameras in the surrounding area for answers.

programme.title: See No Evil: Stalking Cynthia
programme.desc: Cynthia Langrall is shot dead while out for morning jog through the Hillcrest Ranch neighborhood in Glendale, Arizona. Detectives obtain home surveillance footage, which helps to identify the murderer's vehicle, but may not lead to the actual killer.

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID: NCIS: Unbreakable
programme.desc: NCIS agents take viewers inside the emotional investigation into the brutal attack of Marine Corps Sergeant Jan Pawel Pietrzak and his wife, Quiana Jenkins-Pietrzak.

programme.title: My Family's Deadly Secret: Who Killed Cathy?
programme.desc: When 20-year-old student Cathy Torrez is discovered dead in the trunk of her own car, her family won't rest until her killer is bought to justice. After breakthroughs in forensic technology years later, the truth behind who killed Cathy is revealed.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Wedding Day Nightmare
programme.desc: A young woman getting ready to be a bridesmaid at her best friend's wedding is found viciously stabbed to death in her own home.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Classified Murder
programme.desc: Police investigating a couple's mysterious disappearance uncover a trail of terrifying clues.

programme.title: My Family's Deadly Secret: Who Killed Cathy?
programme.desc: When 20-year-old student Cathy Torrez is discovered dead in the trunk of her own car, her family won't rest until her killer is bought to justice. After breakthroughs in forensic technology years later, the truth behind who killed Cathy is revealed.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Wedding Day Nightmare
programme.desc: A young woman getting ready to be a bridesmaid at her best friend's wedding is found viciously stabbed to death in her own home.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Alone with Evil
programme.desc: A young mother is strangled to death during her overnight shift at an office building.

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID: NCIS: Unbreakable
programme.desc: NCIS agents take viewers inside the emotional investigation into the brutal attack of Marine Corps Sergeant Jan Pawel Pietrzak and his wife, Quiana Jenkins-Pietrzak.

programme.title: Diabolical: Murder Is No Accident
programme.desc: After Cynthia Roth drowns in the middle of a crowded lake, investigators will uncover a decades long trail of terror. To catch this killer before they can claim their next victim, detectives will have to take extraordinary measures.

programme.title: Diabolical: A Life of Lies
programme.desc: Prichard AL is normally a quiet town but when the body of Re'Mano Campbell, a loving father, is found slain in his house the community grows apprehensive. And it'll take the cunning wit of local investigators to unravel the mystery of his murder.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: The Olympic Creep
programme.desc: When Olympic gold medallist Sheila Taormina agrees to help wannabe triathlete James Ludham, she doesn't know he wants more than just coaching. His dark fantasies take over her life until she has no other choice but to face him, and her fears, head on.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Cabin in the Woods
programme.desc: Sandra never expected such extreme reprisals from Norman, a man she once called her partner. But when her daughter is caught in the crosshairs, no one can predict how far Norman will go.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: SOS SMS
programme.desc: Hardworking nurse Tara opens a chilling text from a nameless sender - someone who knows her and means her harm.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Can't Let Go
programme.desc: When 18-year-old Misty falls in love with a man nearly 15 years her senior, Misty's parents warn against the relationship. But no one could predict the danger Misty is in, or how this man will change all their lives forever.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Screams in the Desert
programme.desc: Judie starts to date an attractive, caring man called Mike but has no idea that he is utterly obsessed with her, and will stop at nothing until he has her all to himself. After years of mental torture, death threats and stalking Judie fights back.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Friend Request
programme.desc: When single mom Rosita accepts a stranger's friend request, she has no idea he's hiding a terrifying secret that will lead to a deadly game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Unlucky Seven
programme.desc: Heather, a grocery store barista, has just began dating her most recent hire, Arturo. But as time goes by, Arturo is unable to hide his dark side. His obsession with Heather comes at the expense of their relationship, his job - and her life.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Hell's Angel
programme.desc: When lonely teen Meagan Grunwald meets handsome 26-year-old felon Angel Garcia, it's love at first sight. But their whirlwind romance spirals into a hurricane of passion that leaves innocence destroyed and a trail of death and devastation in its path.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Onward, Christian Soldier
programme.desc: While her husband serves in the army, a lonely married mother of three finds comfort in the arms of her church's charismatic new minister. But danger looms in the form of a jealous love-rival that will stop at nothing to scare her away.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Love or Lies
programme.desc: When a young woman is found murdered, her case goes unsolved for a year. A fortuitous arrest brings with it a new prime suspect, but an explosive confession of forbidden love causes everyone close to the case to reevaluate all they know.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Together Forever, Forever Together
programme.desc: A young teen forbidden to date falls in love with a senior at her high school. The two go to extreme lengths to keep their relationship secret but when it is threatened with exposure they vow to stay together, whatever the cost.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mussolini: The Father of Fascism
programme.desc: This is the story of the rise and fall of the man who became a role model to Hitler and some of history's worst dictators of the twentieth century and beyond, Benito Mussolini.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: By the end of June 1940, Hitler was victorious in Western Europe. Nazi Germany now controlled Denmark, Norway, the Netherlands, Belgium and France. Only Britain remained defiant. But the Fuehrer was certain that it could not hold out for long.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's dictator Benito Mussolini dreamt of recreating the Roman Empire. The Mediterranean would become Italy's lake with a great new colonial empire on its southern shore including British-controlled Egypt and Sudan.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's dictator Benito Mussolini dreamt of recreating the Roman Empire. The Mediterranean would become Italy's lake with a great new colonial empire on its southern shore including British-controlled Egypt and Sudan.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: By the end of June 1940, Hitler was victorious in Western Europe. Nazi Germany now controlled Denmark, Norway, the Netherlands, Belgium and France. Only Britain remained defiant. But the Fuehrer was certain that it could not hold out for long.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Johnson County War
programme.desc: In 1880's Wyoming, a feud explodes when ranching homesteaders like Nate Champion face off against cattle barons like Frank Wolcott, over land, power and the future of the American West.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Pleasant Valley War
programme.desc: In the dangerous frontier of Arizona, two ranching families begin as friends, but become locked in an epic battle known as the Pleasant Valley War. It's the deadliest 'family' feud in U.S. history.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Royal Gorge War
programme.desc: When Leadville, Colorado strikes silver in the 1870's, the race is on between the Atchison, Topeka & Santa Fe Railway, and the Denver & Rio Grande Railroad, to be the first to lay tracks through the narrow Royal Gorge.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Hatfields and McCoys
programme.desc: The Hatfields (Devil Anse) versus the McCoys (Randall) is one of the most notorious feuds in American history. What starts as Civil War hostility rapidly escalates to kidnapping, illicit love affairs, murder, and a nation-wide turf war.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Ancient UFO Earth Landings
programme.desc: There's new evidence pointing to the possibility that ancient man was visited by extraterrestrials, influencing ancient technologies, architecture and art. One scholar reveals evidence supporting his theory that ancient Sumerians were created by aliens.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Deep Sea Encounters
programme.desc: After decades of UFO research focusing on the skies, Unidentified Submergible Objects may be the next frontier of study. Newly declassified documents and first-hand accounts are leading researchers to believe that UFOs may be closer than we ever thought.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Area 52
programme.desc: There are mysterious reports coming out of Area 52, including vanishing aircraft, UFOs, and revere engineering of highly advanced technology that have convinced investigators that the military knows more about alien visitation than they will say.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Pilots and Astronauts
programme.desc: Through amazing first-hand accounts from pilots and astronauts, we'll learn that sightings of mysterious, unknown objects in our skies are far more common than we're lead to believe.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in Europe
programme.desc: As 1945 began, Hitler's Third Reich was entering its death throes. In the west, Allied forces were within striking distance of the Rhine. In the east, a Red Army blitzkrieg brought Soviet forces to the River Oder just an hour's drive from Berlin.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler faced a new threat. In the West, Allied preparations to invade northwest France were coming to a climax. It was an attack he had long been expecting. His problem was knowing when and where it would come.

programme.desc: Mike shocks the owner of the 'twice done house' when he discovers mold in her attic. Then, the exterior of the half done house gets a major facelift while Sherry and designer Kimm shop for quartz for the bathroom and fireplace.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Wish Come True
programme.desc: The twice done house's troublesome fence, windows and caulking are done right for the first time, and Michael brings the homeowner over to show her the progress. Meanwhile, the half done house becomes the fully done house and the family is welcomed home.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Holmes Is Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: Work continues on the twice done house as the crew finishes the flooring and the kitchen is installed. Mike must take care of a health issue, leaving Sherry and Michael to put the finishing touches on the renovation.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Blacksmith Breakroom
programme.desc: The crew build a pioneer blacksmith shop made from reclaimed beams, barnwood and rafters to serve as their office breakroom. Mark helps set up the frame, then a local blacksmith installs the forge and gives the guys an anvil lesson.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Saving the Cabin That Saved the Company
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and his crew work to salvage a cabin that saved their business. It takes a variety of repairs to bring it back to life, but once it's up, Katherine has the best surprise of all. Later, Mark's pal Eddie makes a lamp out of reclaimed materials.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Building a Log Chapel With a Stained Glass Window
programme.desc: Mark and the guys head to Johnny Jett's hometown in Kentucky to build a log chapel. First, they reclaim a stained glass window from a deteriorating 100-year-old church. Then they build the chapel and install the window.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: A Barnwood Miracle
programme.desc: The Mt. Olivet Church has been the heart of Pocahontas County, WV for 137 years. The old log structure is struggling to survive, so Mark and the guys are called in to take it down and restore it. As the job ends, the community pulls off a surprise ending.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Mystery House
programme.desc: Michael surprises Ashley with an 1893 raised cottage that he purchased before seeing the full interior. The duo soon finds themselves in over their heads when they realize it's not quite the hidden gem Michael thought it was.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Dream House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley stumble upon a pre-1900s Victorian after some curbside dumpster diving. They hit New Orleans for some perfect vintage decor then return to combine two rooms into one spacious kitchen and make this the dream house worth of the name.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Tiny Craftsman
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley revisit a house they tried to purchase a year ago and find the small 1920s craftsman has been stripped of all its original features.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Run Down Family Rental
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael take on a rundown, family-owned 1939 craftsman. The project is an emotional journey for the duo as the bland home is transformed into a breath-taking abode with room expansions and some inspired flooring choices.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: 1913 Beach Bungalow Restoration
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley find a rundown 1913 beach bungalow that's about to be demolished. They transform the small kitchen into a modern, open-concept space with vintage touches and restore the original hardwood floors and shiplap walls.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Los Angeles, California
programme.desc: Casey travels to sunny Los Angeles for some epic eats including a 2.5-pound fusion burrito loaded with every ingredient in the kitchen and drenched in hot sauce 600 times hotter than a jalapeno.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Diego, CA
programme.desc: Casey travels to San Diego to face off against a five and a half pound stack of pancakes layered with bacon, eggs, sausage, country-fried steak and thick-cut ham.

programme.desc: Noah Cappe samples the freak show food of New Jersey and tries southern sweep potato pie ice cream.

programme.desc: Noah Cappe chows down on a lobster corn dog in California, and tries a deep fried peanut butter and banana sandwich in Pennsylvania.

programme.desc: Two of Katie Lee's favourite things are coming together, the beach and sweets, and she is ready to share the best of the best.

programme.title: Beach Bites With Katie Lee: Off the Eaten Path
programme.desc: Katie's in the know on Sullivan's Island, S.C where she is introduced to the Peanut Butter and Jelly Burger.

programme.title: Beach Bites With Katie Lee: Cheesy Breezy
programme.desc: Katie Lee is toasting the gooey-est of dairy delights. Katie teams up with her Kitchen Co-Host, Marcela Valladolid for tacos in San Diego.

programme.title: Beach Bites With Katie Lee: The Gulf Coast of Mississippi

programme.title: Beach Bites With Katie Lee: The Pacific Coast Highway
programme.desc: Katie Lee is hitting California's famed Pacific Coast Highway to find delicious, international beach food in a beautiful coastal setting. In Monterey, she discovers rich Italian influences in cioppino with local Dungeness crab.

programme.title: Beach Bites With Katie Lee: Tybee Island
programme.desc: Katie Lee heads to Tybee Island, Georgia, a barrier island just 18 miles southeast of culinary Mecca Savannah. The small island is full of big flavors, and Katie starts her exploration with perfectly sweet local shrimp and a spicy blackened fish hoagie.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Open House Brunch
programme.desc: An open house style brunch includes orange spiced crumb cake and creamy scrambled eggs.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: New Diner Favorites
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay dresses up classic diner dishes like chocolate hazelnut s'more French toast, baked pumpkin oatmeal with a cinnamon crisp and an anything-goes style pasta scramble with breakfast sausage, eggs, kale and tomatoes.

programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay prepares a garden fresh menu using his favorite fruits, vegetables and herbs like strawberry waffles with lemon curd cream, an open faced omelet with herb cream cheese topped with smoked salmon and grilled asparagus.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Show and Tell
programme.desc: Martian Mickey pays a visit to the Clubhouse pals and participates in a special show and tell presentation.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pluto's Ball
programme.desc: Pluto loses his favourite ball when he's outside playing with it and bounces it too high.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Daisy's Pony Tale
programme.desc: Professor Von Drake's new Fritzer-Spritzer Spray Potion is accidentally sprayed on Daisy's ponytail, making it grow super long.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Big Band Concert
programme.desc: The Sensational Six Polka Band is planning to provide the musical accompaniment for the baby elephants' dance performance.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Clarabelle's Clubhouse Carnival
programme.desc: Mickey and his friends put on a fun carnival.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Daisy's Grasshopper
programme.desc: Mickey and pals help Daisy find her new friend, Wilbur the Grasshopper.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald Hatches an Egg
programme.desc: The clubhouse pals discover a mystery egg among Goofy's rock collection; they try to find out what kind of animal is inside in order to return it to its mother. In the meantime, Donald Duck serves as a reluctant babysitter when the little egg develops.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy Baby
programme.desc: Professor Von Drake has invented a time machine and Goofy is his first volunteer.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Caught Blue-Handed/ To Squeak, or not to Squeak
programme.desc: When a mysterious rash of blue spots breaks out among some of the toys in the clinic, Doc traces the 'mystery pox' back to Donny's toy monster, Glo-Bo, who had been finger-painting earlier in the day.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super-Charged: The Big Cheesy / Shenannygans!
programme.desc: During the Cooper's Hill Cheese Rolling Chase, a cheese wheel spins out of control! The Happy Helpers work as nannies for two children in London and take them on new experiences!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: A Gollywood Wedding!/ No Dilly Dally in New Delhi!
programme.desc: Mickey and his pals travel to New Delhi, India, for the wedding of their friends Savi and Raj. The Happy Helpers assist an old friend who runs an auto-rickshaw business by being Tuk-Tuk Drivers for the day.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hawaii Pug-Oh/ A.R.F.
programme.desc: When Bob says he'd love to feel the sand on his toes, pug puppy brothers Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to Hawaii. Then, Bob introduces the pups to A.R.F., a robotic dog he created that is programmed to clean up their messes.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The French Toast Connection/ Take Me Out to the Pug Game
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly travel to France to get Bob some French toast. Then, the pugs chase Bob's prized baseball across the city.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: The Case of the Wrecked Recital / The Case of the Vanishing Vessels
programme.desc: When Prince Neel's sitar goes missing, Mira must track it down before great aunt Rupa finds out. Then, Mira goes on a mysterious underground adventure to find toy boats for a race.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Rock-A-Bye Birdie/ The Fly-Along
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy must impress Captain Beakman when she joins them for a ride-a-long delivery. When Mimi the mockingbird sings K.C.'s lullaby she puts everyone at T.O.T.S. to sleep.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: You've Gotta Be Kitten Me / Whale, Hello There
programme.desc: On Pip and Freddy’s first day, they deliver a kitten who mistakes them as her parents. When there is a two-ton baby whale delivery, the fliers compete in a fly-off for the task.

programme.title: Bluey: Early Baby / Hospital / Daddy Putdown
programme.desc: Rusty and Indy come into conflict; Dad is admitted to an imaginary hospital; Dad puts Bluey and Bingo to bed.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A Pyramid Scheme/ Special Delivery
programme.desc: Bongo and Rolly travel to Egypt to find the Great Pyramids. Then, the pugs try to deliver a Mother's Day card for Bob.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Design-a-dog/ Ice, Ice Puggy
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly accidentally chew Bob's childhood toy. Then, when Bobo's icemaker breaks, the pugs go to Antarctica to get him ice.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Go-long Retriever/ Pot O' Pugs
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to get away from a self-fetching stick that begins chasing them. Then, when Bob says he needs a pot of gold, the pups search for one at the end of a rainbow.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hissy's Big Day/ Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to cheer Hissy up by taking her to their favourite places. Later, A.R.F. is reprogrammed to take the pugs where they want, but not being them back.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Hiccup Hazard/ The Great Robot Race
programme.desc: Pip’s hiccups threaten their delivery so he asks Freddy to do the impossible: scare them out of him. Pip and Freddy have to prove that delivery birds are better than a stork drone.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Out Foxed/ Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Freddy's status as the best hide-and-seeker is challenged after he and Pip lose to a baby fox. Pip and Freddy help K.C. earn her first Golden Feather on Cleaning Day.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Mickey's Mixed-Up Motor Lab/ Wishy Washy Helpers
programme.desc: Mickey invents a new Motor Lab to add new upgrades to the gang's roadsters. The Happy Helpers offer their services to make Bigby Towers' windows sparkle and shine.

programme.title: PJ Masks: PJ Sky Pirates / The Disappearing Ninjas
programme.desc: When Night Ninja steals equipment from Pirate Day at school, Catboy jeopardizes the PJ Masks rescue mission. PJ Masks investigate Night Ninja when the ninjalinos keep disappearing!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob and Ana's Bubble Bummer/ Seen Any Seashells?
programme.desc: The Playcare float breaks down before the People and Pets Parade! The Pugs and Keia head out on an ocean-bound mission to find the perfect seashell for Ana!

programme.title: Bluey: Kids/ Butterflies/ The Creek
programme.desc: Bingo and Bluey want to play a game during a shopping trip; Bluey runs away, leaving Bingo all alone; The kids and Dad go on an outing to the creek.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Starship Piggy/ My Buddy
programme.desc: Piggy takes credit for the spaceship Kermit made and takes the Muppet Babies to outer space. Animal lets Fozzie borrow his stuffed bunny, Buddy.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Wishology: The Beginning
programme.desc: Centuries ago, fairy ancestors hid a mystical wand on Earth that has the power to defeat The Darkness, but only the Chosen One depicted in the Fairy World prophecy can unlock its mysteries. Timmy gets chosen for the task, as he resembles the prophecy.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fairly Odd Baby
programme.desc: When Timmy becomes aware of Cosmo and Wanda's desire to be parents, he wishes them up a baby. However, the Anti-Fairies and Pixies join forces to use the child to take over the world. Jorgen helps Timmy, Cosmo and Wanda save the day.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Wishology: The Exciting Middle Part
programme.desc: Timmy learns that to truly defeat The Darkness, he needs a second wand, which is located on the far side of the universe. The threat from the robotic Eliminators still remains as they have stolen Yugopotamia's Fake-i-fier technology.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Game On!
programme.desc: It's not all fun and games when Devon's favourite video game is brought to life in the form of a new Robotron.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Cruisin' for a Bruisin'
programme.desc: Devon discovers that Cruise has some skills that will help the Rangers in battle and pushes him to join the team.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Good Neighbors/ Skill Crane
programme.desc: Squidward obsesses over winning a stuffed animal; Squid's security system backfires.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whatever Happened to SpongeBob
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to spend time with his friends but he ends up being a nuisance to everyone instead. They all tell him to go away, so with a heavy heart, he does just that.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Pest of the West
programme.desc: SpongeBob discovers that he was related to the great Western hero, SpongeBuck.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Flea in Her Dome/ Donut of Shame
programme.desc: Sandy must get rid of her Tree Dome of fleas; Patrick feels bad about taking a donut.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Roller Cowards/ Bucket Sweet Bucket
programme.desc: When the scariest roller coaster ever opens at Bikini Bottom's amusement park, SpongeBob and Patrick are determined to ride it. But the more they think about it, the less they want to do it. Later, Plankton tricks SpongeBob into fixing the Chum Bucket.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spy Buddies/ Boat Smarts/ Good 'Ol What's-His-Name

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Best Day Ever/ The Gift of Gum

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squid on Strike/ Sandy, SpongeBob and the Worm
programme.desc: SpongeBob is petrified by a huge worm and tells Sandy, who drags him into confronting it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Dunces and Dragons/ Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy VI: The Motion Picture
programme.desc: A freak jousting accident lands Bob and Pat in a medieval Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Lost Mattress/ Krabs vs. Plankton
programme.desc: Bob buys Mr. Krabs a new mattress; Plankton sues Mr. Krabs for failing to post a warning.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Litter Bug/ Pranks a Lot
programme.desc: SpongeBob catches The Strangler while on litter patrol; Pat and Bob buy Invisible Spray.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spongebob BC
programme.desc: Thanks to the magic of an underwater thunderstorm, our neanderthal friends discover fire.

programme.desc: Mr. Krabs has SpongeBob and Patrick paint the inside of his house; training for employees.

programme.desc: When Pat suddenly grows a very grown-up beard, he decides it's time to act like a grown-up, too.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Welcome to Chum Bucket/ Frankendoodle
programme.desc: Mr. Krab loses SpongeBob's fry cook contract in a bet with Plankton and SpongeBob is forced to go work at the Chum Bucket; When SpongeBob and Pat discover a pencil from the surface, they begin to draw with it and everything they draw comes to life.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Free Rides/ I'm Your Biggest Fanatic
programme.desc: Spongebob attempts and fails his driving test again; Bob tries to join a special club.

programme.desc: Squidward lets Bob eat an exploding pie; Plankton disguises himself as Mr. Krabs.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar

programme.desc: Pacifica asks Dipper to bust a poltergeist haunting the Northwest Mansion, before he wreaks havoc on her fancy party.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Roadside Attraction

programme.title: DuckTales: Nothing Can Stop Della Duck!

programme.desc: When Gramma crashes into a parked police car, she loses her driver’s license and her confidence. Cricket Green hates bears.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Carpet Diem

programme.title: Martin: Three Men and a Mouse

programme.title: Martin: The Great Payne Robbery
programme.desc: When Martin's neighbor is robbed, Martin holds a neighborhood crime watch meeting.

programme.title: Martin: Baby It's Cole'd Here

programme.title: Martin: Radio Days
programme.desc: Stan decides to hire a new female co-host for Martin's show to boost the ratings. At first Martin feels threatened by the move, and is very stand-offish.

programme.title: Martin: Blackboard Jungle Fever
programme.desc: When Martin returns to his elementary school for Career Day, he discovers his favourite third grade teacher, Ms. Trinidad, is still teaching there. As they catch up, she makes a pass at Martin while Gina watches.

programme.title: Martin: The Night He Came Home
programme.desc: On Halloween, Martin and his friends gather at his apartment to share ghost stories.

programme.title: Martin: I've Got a Secret
programme.desc: Pam, Tommy and Cole are angry at Martin and Gina when Martin reveals Pam's secret on his show. Martin and Gina's only friends left are Martin's boss Stan and Stan's girlfriend.

programme.title: Martin: Do the Fight Thing
programme.desc: Martin's radio fans love it when Gina and Martin have arguments on the show and Stan wants to permanently hire Gina as Martin's co- host.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: It's a Wonderful Lie

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: A Decent Proposal

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Slum Like It...Not!

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Save the Last Trance for Me

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: To Thine Own Self Be Blue … and Gold

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Cold Feet, Hot Body

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Love in an Elevator
programme.desc: While stuck in an elevator, Carlton and Jazz argue over who will be Will's best man.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Wedding Show (Psyche)
programme.desc: Unable to deal with the bickering at home, Will and Lisa travel to Las Vegas to elope.

programme.title: Movie: Like Mike
programme.desc: A 14-year-old orphan loves basketball and idolizes Michael Jordan. After finding a pair of sneakers with the initials 'MJ' inside, he suddenly has the ability to make superhuman jump shots and dunks just like his hero. He dreams of a big NBA career.

programme.title: Movie: Space Jam
programme.desc: Superstar Michael Jordan helps the Looney Tunes win a basketball game against aliens.

programme.title: Movie: Birthday Wish
programme.desc: A woman expecting to get engaged on her 30th birthday gets a different surprise after she makes her wish. She has a glimpse into her future which doesn't resemble anything she's ever imagined.

programme.title: Movie: A Novel Romance
programme.desc: A best-selling novelist writing under a pen name moves to Portland and unknowingly falls in love with the biggest critic of his latest book. When true identities are revealed, both must take a leap of faith.

programme.title: Movie: Falling for Vermont
programme.desc: When a best-selling author decides to escape the media, her plan goes awry when she's caught in a thunderstorm and crashes her car. She wakes up with no memory of who she is.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Love Under the Big Top
programme.desc: Dorothy's in a serious relationship with a lawyer and jumps to the conclusion that he's on the verge of proposing. His annoucement is shocking as he's leaving law to become a circus clown. Rose and Blanch put together a protest to save some dolphins.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dancing in the Dark
programme.desc: Rose has been dating, Miles Webber, a college professor, but the only thing they seem to have in common is the dance floor.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Not Another Monday
programme.desc: Sophia's friend has come up with an idea that will change her life. She wants to commit suicide and she wants Sophia there to hold her hand.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That Old Feeling
programme.desc: Blanche is visited by her brother in-law and is taken back by his resemblance to her deceased husband. She quickly finds herself falling in love with hopes of marriage.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Comedy of Errors
programme.desc: Dorothy wants to fulfill her ambition to become a stand-up comic.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: All That Jazz
programme.desc: Dorothy's son shows up, jobless and wifeless, and wanting to be a free spirit.

programme.title: Frasier: Roz's Krantz and Gouldenstein Are Dead

programme.title: Frasier: The Unnatural
programme.desc: Upon learning that the radio station's softball team is short one player, Frasier's son, Frederick, insists his dad should fill in. Not wanting to let his son down, Frasier asks Martin to help him learn how to play.

programme.title: Frasier: Roz's Turn
programme.desc: When Roz decides to audition for her own radio show, Frasier mistakenly tells his agent, Bebe, that he would be sad to see Roz go. Frasier is outraged when Bebe tells the station manager that Frasier would quit if Roz got her own show.

programme.title: Frasier: Ham Radio
programme.desc: Frasier volunteers to recreate the radio station's first ever mystery play, but disaster looms when his only professional actor quits. Family and friends help Frasier as he struggles to perform each role.

programme.title: Frasier: Three Dates and a Breakup
programme.desc: Niles attends a benefit with Frasier in the hopes of meeting an eligible woman, but it is Frasier who ends up with all the attention. While Frasier juggles three dates in three days, he also has to mend his father's strained relationship with Sherry.

programme.title: Frasier: Three Dates and a Breakup
programme.desc: Niles attends a benefit with Frasier in the hopes of meeting an eligible woman, but it is Frasier who ends up with all the attention. While Frasier juggles three dates in three days, he also has to mend his father's strained relationship with Sherry.

programme.title: Frasier: Daphne Hates Sherry
programme.desc: Daphne and Sherry clash over their relationship with Martin, so Daphne stays at Niles's.

programme.title: Frasier: Are You Being Served?
programme.desc: Niles receives divorce papers from Maris and to show he is not as spineless as people think, he signs them immediately. Later, he begins to regret his impulsiveness and seeks counsel from Martin and Frasier.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Plays Cupid
programme.desc: Lucy tries to arrange a match between a love-starved older lady and a giddy grocery man.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Fakes Illness
programme.desc: If Ricky keeps refusing to hire Lucy, she fears she will have to have a nervous breakdown.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Writes a Play
programme.desc: Lucy decides to write a play after failing to become an actress.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Breaking the Lease
programme.desc: Lucy and Ricky's singing almost breaks a lease and a friendship.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ebb Tide
programme.desc: Dorothy accompanies Blanche to Atlanta for Big Daddy's funeral.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Have Yourself a Very Little Christmas
programme.desc: Christmas is driving everyone a little crazy as they all search for the perfect gifts.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Mary Has a Little Lamb
programme.desc: Dorothy aids a pregnant and unwed teen who was rejected by her father.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Great Expectations
programme.desc: Rose is touting the power of positive thinking; Blanche's beau has a heart attack.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Triple Play
programme.desc: Miles introduces Rose to his daughter Caroline; Blanche rents a Mercedes to attract men.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Clinton Avenue Memoirs
programme.desc: After digging out the family album, Sophia wants to visit their old home in Brooklyn.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Guests include Shawn Christian, Katy Mixon, and Danielle Kartes.

programme.title: Movie: Winter Love Story
programme.desc: An author publishes her first novel, but it fails to sell well so she embarks on a book tour. While on tour, she meets a handsome fantasy-author that helps boost her sales, and a romance quickly follows.

programme.title: Movie: Pearl in Paradise
programme.desc: Alex, a photographer for a travel magazine, and Colin, a best-selling author, team up to find an elusive Fijian pearl.

programme.title: Movie: Autumn in the Vineyard
programme.desc: Two former sweethearts from two rival winemaking families end up with joint ownership of a vineyard. They decide to split the vineyard down the middle for the fall harvest and compete for winner takes all stakes.

programme.title: The Office: The Merger

programme.title: The Office: The Convict
programme.desc: Michael tries to be supportive after he learns that a new employee is an ex-convict.

programme.title: The Office: Back From Vacation
programme.desc: Still in vacation mode after his trip to Jamaica, Michael tries to hang on to his relaxed island vibe despite a wave of office hassles. It all becomes too much when an e-mail containing a racy vacation photo is forwarded around the office.

programme.title: The Office: Traveling Salesmen
programme.desc: On Andy's suggestion, Michael has staffers team up for sales calls, leading to some interesting, insightful moments in the field. Meanwhile, Dwight attempts to cover for Angela after she misses an important deadline.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: May 14, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: The Office: The Return
programme.desc: Oscar returns from his vacation with mixed emotions on whether or not he wants to be a part of the office. Meanwhile, Andy takes advantage of recent events to get closer to Michael. Jim turns to Karen and Pam for help to stage a prank on a new target.

programme.title: The Office: Ben Franklin
programme.desc: Acting on bad advice he received from his friend Todd Packer, Michael brings two 'adult' performers into the office in honour of Phyllis's wedding shower. Meanwhile, Karen confronts Pam about her past with Jim.

programme.title: The Office: Phyllis' Wedding
programme.desc: Phyllis regrets giving Michael an important job at her wedding after several embarrassing moments. Pam has flashbacks of her own wedding planning when she sees Phyllis's decorations. Meanwhile, Dwight is determined to catch wedding crashers.

programme.title: The Office: Business School

programme.title: The Office: Cocktails

programme.title: The Office: The Negotiation
programme.desc: Darryl decides to meet with Michael to negotiate a pay increase. Meanwhile, Jim deals with the consequences of Pam's confession to Roy.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: May 18, 2020

programme.title: The Closer: Cherry Bomb
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl is found dead and questions lead to the son of an L.A. County Sheriff. As Johnson investigates, she learns that the son may be hiding behind his father's badge and may have done so before.

programme.title: The Closer: Live Wire
programme.desc: When a reporter alerts Brenda to a crime scene, Priority Homicide and the FBI fight for jurisdiction over the case. Meanwhile, interpersonal relationships on the squad force Brenda into a corner.

programme.title: The Closer: Dial 'M' for Provenza
programme.desc: Things spiral out of control when Provenza goes undercover to look into a murder for hire.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Dark Was the Night
programme.desc: Teddy puts her husband's life in the hands of her peers when Henry is sent to the OR for surgery and she is called away on another case. Meredith and Derek receive the long-awaited news about Zola.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Suddenly
programme.desc: A severe car crash involving an entire family results in an all-hands-on situation in the ER, as the eldest daughter is left to make the toughest decision of her life.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: This Magic Moment
programme.desc: The doctors split into teams for a risky surgery involving conjoined twins; Bailey recruits Meredith to be a buffer between her and Ben when he puts pressure on moving their relationship to a more serious level; Richard teaches Alex a tough lesson.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Hope for the Hopeless
programme.desc: Richard celebrates his 10,000th surgery and Derek and Lexie take on an inoperable case. Teddy and Cristina go against Owen's orders, Meredith searches for a specialty and Adele is brought in after she is found wandering the street.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: If/ Then
programme.desc: As Meredith puts Zola to bed and falls asleep, she begins to wonder what life could have been like under different circumstances. The reverberations of a happy Meredith Grey change the world of Seattle Grace as we know it.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: All You Need Is Love
programme.desc: In the spirit of Valentine's Day, Meredith and Derek try to have a night to themselves when Lexie offers to watch Zola; Callie hands babysitting duties over to Mark so that she can surprise Arizona with a romantic evening.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: Three bombings within a two-mile area were more than a coincidence, but no one claimed responsibility and no one in particular was targeted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fresh Heir
programme.desc: In the 20 years following an unsolved murder, lives changed and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Caught on Tape
programme.desc: When a Spaniard is sentenced to death for the murder of a young Florida couple, his family appeals to the international media to fight his conviction.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: The Wrong Gun
programme.desc: In Texas, a 17-year-old with a violent past is named the killer in a drug deal gone wrong - but a misidentified bullet could unravel the case.

programme.title: The Killer Truth: Classified Ad For Crime
programme.desc: Two murders across the country send police into a multi-state manhunt, searching for one killer couple.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Case of the Flue
programme.desc: In 1993, when an 83 year old woman was found dead in her home, investigators used clues like flecks of paint, t-shirt fibres, and a cellular phone to work out just how, and why, she died.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man is gunned down outside his Louisiana home. His wife tells a tale of three masked men emerging from the shadows, but she may know more than she's saying.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A college student vanished without a trace, and dirt on a pair of shoes reveals the extent of one man's deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insignificant Others
programme.desc: A man's wife had taken her own life, and his college sweetheart had killed herself in much the same fashion fourteen years earlier. Investigators had to determine if this was a coincidence or an attempt to get away with murder twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All 'Butt' Certain
programme.desc: A woman is convinced her husband is innocent of murder and conducted her own investigation to prove it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block
programme.desc: An architect became ill and died just before she was to testify in a criminal trial.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clean Getaway
programme.desc: An employee of a dry-cleaner was raped and murdered in the store with two eyewitnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Prints Among Thieves
programme.desc: An eccentric millionaire who flaunted his wealth is found murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Alliance
programme.desc: Police fear a missing woman is the latest victim in a string of similar crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skirting the Evidence
programme.desc: A woman won $5,000 at the Blackjack table then, three hours later, was kidnapped. A month after that, she was found dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Small Town Terror

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fresh Heir

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soiled Plan

programme.title: Forensic Files: Headquarters

programme.title: Forensic Files: One for the Road

programme.title: Forensic Files: Army of Evidence
