programme.title: Mike & Molly: Mike the Tease
programme.desc: Mike studies male fertility and visits a clinic to ensure that his swimmers are up to the task of starting a family with Molly. Meanwhile, Vince gets a new job selling vacuum cleaners door-to-door.

programme.title: Mom: Lumbar Support and Old Pork
programme.desc: Bonnie has an unexpected reaction when she learns that Adam’s bar is doing well. Also, Christy and Tammy go on a double date.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Tinkle Like a Princess
programme.desc: Charlie runs off to Vegas and returns with a new wife, but she's not Chelsea.

programme.title: Black-ish: Sprinkles
programme.desc: Initially wary, Dre embraces throwing Bow's baby shower and wants it to be unforgettable. However, his plans are put on hold when Bow stops by the OB/GYN with a headache and discovers she is having complications.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Johnson Show
programme.desc: Dre has always strived to mirror his life after the model families he grew up watching on TV. When news spreads that Stevens & Lido is going through layoffs, Dre panics that his family's reputation will be tarnished if he loses his job.

programme.title: DC's Stargirl: Pilot
programme.desc: Courtney finds herself struggling to adapt to her new town and high school, but becomes the unlikely inspiration for a new generation of superheroes when she discovers her step-dad is harboring a major secret about his past.

programme.title: DC's Legends of Tomorrow: I am Legends
programme.desc: The Legends drink from Chalice have 24 hours to get to the Waverider and use the Loom of Fire, but they quickly discover the sisters have stolen the Waverider and they're stuck at Constantine's house during a zombie apocalypse.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Joey's Interview
programme.desc: Joey is thrilled when his name is used as a clue in Soap Opera Digest's crossword puzzle.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Race
programme.desc: Jerry meets an old rival who suspects him of cheating in a high school race. Elaine is 'blacklisted' for Chinese food delivery. George responds to a personal ad in a Communist newspaper while at work. Kramer becomes a department store Santa.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Checkpoint Joyce
programme.desc: Mike is forced to arrest Joyce for a DUI after she refuses to take a breathalyzer at a checkpoint.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: I Found Your Moustache
programme.desc: Charlie and Chelsea have a post-break-up one-night stand.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: There Can Be Only One Highlander Club
programme.desc: Despite Beverly wanting the two boys to bond, Adam and Johnny Atkins compete for the head of the Highlander Club at school. Meanwhile, Barry tries to keep the JTP from sharing Murray's fate of falling out of touch with his high school friends.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Couples Costume
programme.desc: When Dana comes to visit Adam for Halloween, he wants to spend the night with her and not Beverly. Later, Barry and Erica convince Adam to take Dana to a haunted house. Adam refuses to go back inside when Dana loses her promise ring.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And Not-So-Sweet Charity
programme.desc: Max and Caroline approach Caroline's rich but callous Aunt Charity for money to save their failing cupcake shop.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: The Game: Brittany's Super Sweet Sixth
programme.desc: Kelly's daughter wants an extravagant birthday party like the rest of her friends. Kelly approaches Jason for money and he refuses. Derwin beats Malik in an XBOX game and looks for a re-match to redeem himself.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Guess Who's Coming to Dinner
programme.desc: Although Mike is thrown for a loop when he meets his new neighbours, a loving lesbian couple, he is impressed with the similar interests he shares with one of the women.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Jackeé Harry, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Whitney Cummings, and Bill Engvall.

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers: Miller vs. Brown
programme.desc: A woman is certain her tattoo artist boyfriend is doing more than just creating art on the skin of his female clients.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Not the Cat's Meow
programme.desc: A woman sues a man for tossing her cat into oncoming traffic and demands him to pay for the medical expenses.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Beauty Supply Push/ You're Not My Mother
programme.desc: Mother sues beauty shop owner; woman sues for return of tuition from son's girlfriend.

programme.title: Right This Minute
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Smith vs. Womack Jr.
programme.desc: More than three years after her daughter is born, a woman stuns a former high school jock with claims that he is the father.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Religious Tour Gone Wrong
programme.desc: A woman sues for her money back when her family is unfairly sent home from a tour.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: If the Camper's a Rockin'
programme.desc: Logyn wants to know why her relationship with JD became an utter nightmare with his serial cheating. Stripper Meeka developed feelings for customer Chris who neglected to tell her he's married.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: The plaintiff was married to the defendant but claims their marriage was rocky because they both were addicted to drugs. She claims she has now been sober for over three years and believes her ex is still using, and she’s suing him for breach of contract.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Dinging A DeLorean' , ' Losing Control' and 'Cleaning Out The Place.'

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segment features the cases 'Not Computing', ' Bad Breeding ', and ' Tenant Tensions'.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: A Misunderstanding
programme.desc: A young girl wants her boyfriend to pay her back for all the money she spent on a trip.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: An aunt sues her niece for multiple items, while the niece is countersuing. Then, a man sues his ex for breach of contract for money he allegedly loaded her. The ex says he knew her financial situation and shouldn't be held responsible.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Encore: Mom Guilty of Child Porn With Daughters
programme.desc: Steve provides an update on the story of Bertie and her mother Minnie. Minnie did prison time for recording her daughters in child porn. However, she insisted that she was innocent and did time for a crime she didn't commit.

programme.title: Maury: You Cheated With a White Man ... That's Not My Son's Baby!
programme.desc: Deraneesha’s family told Eric that she cheated with a white man, and now Eric is denying her daughter. Tanner is denying Brandice's baby. CJ became aloof and doesn't claim to be the father of Derica's baby.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Cuddling Gets Complicated
programme.desc: Jessi says she is tired of her no strings attached relationship to a guy named Michael. She's hoping to convince him that it's time to settle down but a mistake she made by kissing his best friend Chris could cost her the relationship.

programme.title: The Mel Robbins Show: What's Your Worry Type?
programme.desc: Mel Robbins helps people to understand what holds them back, to be able to move forward.

programme.title: Movie: Grandma's Boy
programme.desc: A 35-year-old man named Alex is forced to live with his grandmother after getting thrown out of his former place due to non-payment of rent.

programme.title: Movie: Down to You
programme.desc: A man finds the girl of his dreams only to discover that she is not ready for commitment.

programme.title: Movie: Overnight Delivery
programme.desc: Convinced of his girlfriend's infidelity, a man sends a much-regretted poison-pen letter.

programme.title: Movie: Forget Paris
programme.desc: The story of a romance between an NBA referee and an American woman living in Paris.

programme.title: Movie: Due Date
programme.desc: After being kicked off an airplane, a man must rent a car and drive cross-country with the person who got him on the no-fly list, in order to make it to his child's birth on time.

programme.title: Movie: Wild Hogs
programme.desc: A group of middle-aged men try to put their troubles behind them as they set out on a road trip on their Harleys.

programme.title: Movie: The Flintstones
programme.desc: Fred Flintstone is secretly set up as the perpetrator of an embezzlement scheme for work.

programme.title: Movie: The Flintstones in Viva Rock Vegas
programme.desc: Fred Flintstone, the boy from the wrong side of the rocks, courts the beautiful, young heiress Wilma Slaghoople. Along with best friend Barney Rubble, and his future fiancée Betty, Fred and Wilma head off for a romantic weekend in Rock Vegas.

programme.title: Movie: Agent Cody Banks
programme.desc: A teenage, secret agent goes undercover at a prep school to obtain access to a scientist.

programme.title: Movie: Head Office
programme.desc: The son of a senator falls in love with a woman leading a crusade against his father.

programme.title: Movie: Raising Arizona
programme.desc: An eccentric, childless couple decide to kidnap one baby from a set of quintuplets.

programme.title: Movie: War Dogs
programme.desc: During the Iraq War, two friends in their early 20s bid on U.S. Military contracts to get rich, and win a $300-million deal to arm the Afghan Military. The new deal puts them in business with dangerous and shady characters.

programme.title: Movie: School of Rock
programme.desc: Kicked out of his rock band, flat broke and lacking any job skills whatsoever, Dewey Finn fakes his way into a job as a substitute teacher at a stuffy private school. Once there, he teaches the kids about rock and roll.

programme.title: Movie: Almost Heroes
programme.desc: Two 19th-century explorers attempt to reach the Pacific Ocean before Lewis and Clark.

programme.title: Movie: Grosse Pointe Blank
programme.desc: A hitman returns home to do a little business and attend his high school reunion.
